results.title: The Invite
results.overview: Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

results.title: The Invite
results.overview: A short comedy film following a vampire who needs to take a shit.

results.title: The Invite
results.overview: A photographer returns home to visit his parents in a story about family, sacrifice, and the calling of unfulfilled dreams.

results.title: The Invite
results.overview: Selena trains the weak and vulnerable to defend themselves from the predators that lurk in the shadows. She never imagined that she would have to become one of those very same predators in hopes of saving her husband from a terminal illness.

results.title: The Invite
results.overview: Jack is really Jax. They are nonbinary but struggling to express it. Then, a series of letters arrive from an anonymous source that seems to know everything about them. The letters call them to a mystical place full of transformation, self-love, and community. But first, they must accept The Invite.

results.title: The Friends We Invite Over Into Our Brains
results.original_title: The Friends We Invite Over Into Our Brains
results.overview: Toni makes some new friends inside her own head.

results.title: The Invited
results.overview: One evening three friends go on a joyride, only two return. The other, accidentally killed. They thought no one had witnessed their accident, they were wrong.

results.title: The Invited
results.overview: A young married couple who are pregnant with their first child moves into their turn-of-the-century home where they discover that a great evil has resided there for nearly a century, unleashed by a previous occupant.

results.title: The Invited Man
results.overview: Min-ho wants passionate sex and his wife Eun-kyeong says sex is just a verification of love.  Min-ho wants unique sex again tonight but Eun-kyeong only wants the usual sex in bed.  One day, Eun-kyeong gets sex toys at work. She doesn't like them at first but she can't get over the great feeling from the massage shop and starts touching herself. Min-ho sees this and he gets horny. In the end, they have sex that they will never forget.

results.title: The Invited
results.overview: Love isn’t always chosen. Sometimes… you’re invited.  He thought he found love—he was really chosen for sacrifice.  An ambitious but lonely computer programmer finally meets the girl of his dreams. But when passion turns into obsession, he uncovers the horrifying truth: her love is not her own—it belongs to a cult that has marked him as their next sacrifice.  What begins as romance spirals into paranoia, manipulation, and terrifying visions of rituals he cannot escape. The deeper he digs, the more he realizes this isn’t just a relationship—it’s initiation.

results.title: The Invited
results.overview: Love isn’t always chosen. Sometimes… you’re invited.  He thought he found love—he was really chosen for sacrifice.  An ambitious but lonely computer programmer finally meets the girl of his dreams. But when passion turns into obsession, he uncovers the horrifying truth: her love is not her own—it belongs to a cult that has marked him as their next sacrifice.  What begins as romance spirals into paranoia, manipulation, and terrifying visions of rituals he cannot escape. The deeper he digs, the more he realizes this isn’t just a relationship—it’s initiation.  Watch the chilling descent unfold in The Invited — full movie, FREE to watch.  A forbidden love, a terrifying secret, and a nightmare of cult horror you’ll never forget.

results.title: Who Invited the Robots?
results.overview: Young love is so easy....at the beginning. Adam and Dolores want to take the next big step in their relationship by moving in together, but Dolores needs her friend's approval first. A dinner party is set so everyone can become acquainted with Dolores' new boyfriend. A true test of any budding love story - will they like Adam? Will Adam like them? It's a nerve wracking moment for everyone involved, but what's the worst that could happen?

results.title: You're Invited: The Making of Night of the Demons
results.original_title: You're Invited: The Making of Night of the Demons
results.overview: Retrospective documentary on the making of the low-budget horror cult favorite Night of the Demons (1988).

results.title: Crayon Shin-chan: Fierceness That Invites Storm! The Battle of the Warring States
results.original_title: クレヨンしんちゃん 嵐を呼ぶ アッパレ！戦国大合戦
results.overview: Shin-chan somehow travels back in time, where he promptly involves himself in samurai wars and political intrigue, changing history left and right!

results.title: Crayon Shin-chan: Fierceness That Invites Storm! The Kasukabe Boys of the Evening Sun
results.original_title: クレヨンしんちゃん 嵐を呼ぶ！夕陽のカスカベボーイズ
results.overview: At a strange movie theater, everyone gets sucked into the film they're watching. The longer they stay, the less they remember about the real world!

results.title: Crayon Shin-chan: Fierceness That Invites Storm! Me and the Space Princess
results.original_title: クレヨンしんちゃん 嵐を呼ぶ!オラと宇宙のプリンセス
results.overview: The Noharas get abducted by aliens who claim that Shin-chan's baby sister is their princess! Will she stay on this planet or return to Kasukabe?

results.title: Crayon Shin-chan: Fierceness That Invites Storm! The Singing Buttocks Bomb
results.original_title: クレヨンしんちゃん 嵐を呼ぶ 歌うケツだけ爆弾！
results.overview: When an alien bomb powerful enough to destroy the entire planet sticks to the buttocks of Shin-chan's pet dog Shiro, a race to save the world begins.

results.title: Dark Woman Arranger Reika - Bewitching Beauty Scout Invites You Into the Sweet Darkness
results.original_title: 闇の女手配師レイカ　妖艶美女スカウトが誘う甘美な闇
results.overview: Reika, a "female arranger" who introduces sex work to women who have no place to go in Kabukicho. She teams up with the yakuza Hiraiwa to scout Meg, a former underground idol and debt-ridden meg, to a high-class dating club, and gradually sinks her into hell while feeding her sweet food. What comes to her mind is when she steps into this dark world with her brother Hideto to take revenge on the "Night King" who once derailed their lives, and ends up confronting Hiraiwa while aiming for the top.

results.title: Crayon Shin-chan: Fierceness That Invites Storm! The Hero of Kinpoko
results.original_title: クレヨンしんちゃん ちょー嵐を呼ぶ金矛の勇者
results.overview: A sinister force is invading the neighborhood, and Shinnosuke is the only one who notices -- until a kid named Mata appears to help him save the day.

results.title: The Little Guests Invited by the Sun
results.overview: Another happy Children's Day is coming. The kindly father-in-law Sun sits in the palace of heaven and laments that the children get up earlier than him. Although tens of thousands of years have passed, Grandpa Sun decided to invite children from the earth to his palace for the holiday. Of course, an invitation must be issued before that, so Eunuch Sun entrusts the lovely and mischievous messenger of light to the earth to convey the good news.
